summary: Frontend-only testing completed for UI fixes. All 9 test cases passed. Diamond logo properly sized (81x81 px), not covering Start Game button. Artist card selection, search, clear buttons, Start Game enable/disable, navigation modals, and GameBoard all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Diamond logo fix verified - 81x81px, properly positioned in .logo-section
ArtistCard props correctly implemented: number, artist, onSelect, onClear, excludeIds
Start Game button state correctly toggles between disabled and 'ready' class based on artist selection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All home page features working. Diamond logo UI fix verified. Next testing should focus on gameplay flow (selecting collaborations, building chain, winning/losing conditions) if not already tested.

home_page_layout.description: Diamond logo properly sized (81x81px), title 'Connect the Notes' visible, Start Game button not covered

choose_for_me_button.description: 'Choose for Me' button successfully selects random artist from database

artist_search_functionality.description: Search input shows dropdown with results, clicking result selects artist

start_game_button_state.description: Button has 'ready' class when both artists selected, disabled when not

clear_artist_button.description: X button clears selected artist, returns card to search state

how_to_play_modal.description: Modal opens with instructions, close button works

options_modal.description: Modal shows game mode settings, gameplay toggles, and stats

leaderboard_modal.description: Modal shows period filters (Today/This Week/All Time) and sort options

game_board_display.description: Shows current artist, goal, step counter, collaborations grid, back button works
